description_long: This is a large, modern residential house with a rectangular footprint, surrounded by landscaped greenery and a fenced backyard. The structure features a combination of flat and gently sloped gable roofs, with multiple large windows arranged in symmetrical rows along the front and rear facades. The front of the house is lined with dense shrubbery and a paved driveway leading to a covered carport area. The backyard includes a spacious patio, a swimming pool, and a hot tub, all enclosed by a low green hedge. The exterior is finished in light gray and white tones, with clean lines and minimal decorative elements. The main entryway is centrally located, accessible via a short set of steps and flanked by large windows.
description: A spacious, modern two-story house with large windows, landscaped gardens, a pool, and a carport, finished in light gray and white.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entry, symmetrical windows, dense shrubbery, and the carport on the left.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the carport, driveway, and the length of the house with the backyard visible.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the fenced backyard, swimming pool, hot tub, and patio area.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the driveway, carport, and the backyard enclosure.
attribute_entryway_design: Central entry with steps, large glass door, flanked by windows, and a covered porch area.
